programme.title: Viaje por amor
programme.desc: Guzmán renuncia y se va a buscar a Nikki. Victoria decide irse a Argentina por unos meses. Beatriz está embarazada después de la violation de Leonardo. Leo demanda q Beatriz rompa con salcero si quiere ver a su hijo algún día.

programme.title: Season 1
programme.desc: The pilot outline for "Amores Verdaderos" "Amores Verdaderos pilot introduces Victoria, a successful woman engaged to Armando. She meets José Ángel, a humble gardener, leading to unexpected connections and family conflicts."

programme.title: Cambios y reencuentros
programme.desc: Guzmán se divorció y regresa a MX. Victoria regresa y se encuentra con Carlos. Adriana compra regalos a Liliana. Odette maltrata a Jean Marie.

programme.title: Escena de celos
programme.desc: Arriaga espera ansioso a Victoria. Carlos engaña a Victoria con su identidad. Roy quiere regresar a MX. Arriaga se pone celoso al saber q Victoria estuvo con Carlos. Nelson no quiere darle el divorcio a Victoria. Tiene amenazado a Aníbal.

programme.title: En búsqueda del amor
programme.desc: Victoria va a una simple cena con Carlos. Nelson quiere regresar con Victoria. Adriana llama a nikki y ella le cuenta q Guzmán no se casó con Liliana. Nikki se va a NY en busca de Guzmán. Guzmán se regresa a MX.

programme.title: Season 1
programme.desc: The pilot outline for "Amores Verdaderos" "Amores Verdaderos pilot introduces Victoria, a successful woman engaged to Armando. She meets José Ángel, a humble gardener, leading to unexpected connections and family conflicts."

programme.title: Otra oportunidad en el amor
programme.desc: Kendra reclama a Nelson. Candelaria va a hablar con Aníbal. Nelson se entretiene con Nabila. Victoria los ve. Guillo está perdido en MX y se encuentra con un pobre. Victoria está celosa de Adriana.

programme.title: Beso sorpresa
programme.desc: Nikki no encuentra a Guzmán. El llega a MX y Liliana lo besa y le pide q sean novios. El la rechaza. Adriana está fascinada con Jean Constantin. El se ve con Victoria. Kendra se va a vengar de Nabila.

programme.title: Nikki regresa
programme.desc: Roy y Nikki regresan y les dicen a sus familias q se divorcian. Guzmán ve a Nikki pero la Liliana le dice q ella es la se va a pasear con el. Victoria rechaza a Carlos.

programme.title: Ruido fantasma
programme.desc: Los vecinos escuchan un ruido estremecedor en el edificio y sospechan que es un fantasma, por lo que deciden realizar un ritual para expulsarlo. Mientras tanto, Morris busca empleo.

programme.title: Nos cayó la chaviza
programme.desc: Uno de los departamentos está en renta y Sofi, una chava muy positiva, tiene interés en rentarlo. Pero, ¿crees que los vecinos accedan a tener una nueva inquilina? Por otro lado, Luis y Silvia tendrán diferencias por Sandro, la ex pareja de Silvia.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: In a neighborhood in Mexico City, the neighbors have problems and silly misadventures with one another.

programme.title: Día del niño
programme.desc: El Día del Niño llega y los vecinos se organizan para festejar en el edificio. Cada uno propone un acto para divertir a los pequeños y cada departamento aportará una cantidad de dinero. Sin embargo, Luis será el más afectado.

programme.title: Vecindad
programme.desc: Unos extranjeros que viven al lado del edificio buscan conocer la cultura mexicana, así que Doña Magda aprovecha para mostrarles que cada vecino tiene algo que enseñar a cambio de dinero. Checa hasta dónde llegará Doña Magda por obtener ganancias.

programme.title: Las tortas de mi primo
programme.desc: Un coach motivacional llega a la vida de Luis para intentar calmar su mal humor. Además, el primo de Germán llega de visita con tortas ahogadas de Guadalajara, y todos querrán la receta de su salsa, haciendo lo que sea por obtenerla.

programme.title: La casa de los riojosos
programme.desc: Un clásico entre América y Guadalajara desata una pelea entre Luis y Pedro. Averigua cómo terminará este conflicto. Además, los vecinos apoyarán a su favorito. Descubre si la relación entre ambos podrá recuperarse.

programme.title: La carnita y la mudanza
programme.desc: Por fin algo que jamás se pensaba ha sucedido, pues Lorena y Magda hacen alianzas para que Sofi, la nueva inquilina, se mude de la forma más tranquila posible. Además, el jefe de Arturo acude a su casa para comer con ellos.

programme.title: Cita de cata
programme.desc: Luis organiza una cata de vinos para impresionar a su jefe, pero los vecinos podrían arruinarlo. Liz ayuda a Vanesa a encontrar pareja por una aplicación.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: In a neighborhood in Mexico City, the neighbors have problems and silly misadventures with one another.

programme.title: Nueva chamba
programme.desc: Luis recibe una oferta para ser director general, pero en Tuxtla Gutiérrez, Chiapas. Descubre qué decisión tomará. Mientras tanto, Alejandra busca la oportunidad de que la despidan y hará todo lo posible para lograrlo. Descubre si su plan funcionará.

programme.title: El grupo de whats
programme.desc: Germán convoca a una junta vecinal, pero nadie asiste porque nadie vio el anuncio en el pizarrón, Jorjais les propone hacer un grupo de chat para enterarse de los acontecimientos en el edificio.

programme.title: El gas
programme.desc: Como es costumbre en el edificio, los vecinos no pagan la cuota del gas, y ante la negativa de todos, Luis decide poner su propio tanque estacionario ¡en la azotea!

programme.title: Franeleros
programme.desc: Luis estaciona su carro afuera de su edificio y un franelero quiere cobrarle 20 pesos por cuidar su coche. Los vecinos hacen una junta para planear quitarlos sin que haya consecuencias.

programme.title: El reciclaje
programme.desc: Los vecinos reciben una invitación de la delegación para separar la basura. Algo muy básico: orgánica e inorgánica, Germán es el encargado de dicha misión.

programme.title: La fiesta de Morris
programme.desc: Magdalena abre una cuenta en Facebook donde presume demasiadas cosas e inclusive transmite en vivo una invitación pública para la fiesta de su nieto Morris.

programme.title: La chica del feis
programme.desc: Pedro se dedica a buscar mujeres por Facebook, y ante el asombro de Luis, conoce a una chica guapísima; Luis tiene curiosidad y decide aplicar la misma técnica para encontrar al amor de su vida.

programme.title: Como en casa
programme.desc: Silvia, desesperada por conocer hombres, renta una habitación de su departamento por medio de una aplicación; un hombre apuesto renta el cuarto, ella se enamora, pero aparece la ex novia y comienzan los problemas.

programme.title: El simulacro
programme.desc: Un temblor llega a la ciudad sacudiendo todos los departamentos de los vecinos. Luis les propone a los vecinos llevar a una persona de Protección civil para prepararlos ante una emergencia.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.desc: Ken (Ken Jeong) is invited to audition for a TV show, and Clark (Jonathan Slavin) encourages Pat (Dave Foley) and Damona (Tisha Campbell-Martin) to get married. Guest starring Dan Harmon and Alison Brie.

programme.title: Dr. Ken (Pilot)
programme.desc: In the first episode, Ken is stressed out at work over his "whining, complaining" patients so he schedules a therapy session with Allison, while back at home, Ken is nervous about Molly’s driving test – "What if she doesn't fail!"

programme.title: Ken Teaches Molly A Lesson
programme.desc: An overenthusiastic Ken goes overboard while attempting to teach Molly how to drink responsibly. Meanwhile, Allison comes to terms with the reality that she's not the fun parent. At work, Julie is frustrated that being a doctor is not like it is on TV.

programme.title: Ken Helps Pat
programme.desc: A decree to work on Saturdays is met with contempt by the staff, so they choose Ken to talk Pat out of it, but the doctor is surprised to find his boss living on a boat in the driveway of his home. Meanwhile, Dave gets a new nickname at school that dredges up bad memories for Allison.

programme.title: The Seminar
programme.desc: Clark gets a promotion, but Ken doesn't even notice because of his selfishness, so Clark files a phony complaint that forces Ken to attend a seminar to correct his bedside manner, leaving Allison alone for dinner with Ken's parents.

programme.title: Dr. Wendi: Coming To LA
programme.desc: A visit from Ken's sister Wendi, a well-known doctor and TV host on a medical talk show, makes him secretly envious of her success, which brings out his petulant side when he's invited to be a guest on her program.

programme.title: Halloween-aversary
programme.desc: Ken attempts to give Allison the proposal she never had. Meanwhile Molly enlists Dave's help to reconstruct Ken's prized model skeleton. At work, Julie accidentally drugs Pat.

programme.title: Kevin O'Connell
programme.desc: Ken is thrown when he finds out that Allison's ex-boyfriend is an incredibly hot, successful Korean doctor. Meanwhile, Damona helps Julie with her networking skills.

programme.title: Assembly Required with Stacey Abrams (How Billionaires Are Destroying the Media (with Joy Reid))
programme.desc: The media landscape in the US continues to undergo drastic transformations, with billionaire ownership and corporate consolidation leading to mass layoffs and content censorship. This week, Stacey is joined by Joy Reid, host of the Joy Reid Show and the first black woman to host a primetime program on cable news. They talk about the layoffs at the Washington Post, why she transitioned into independent media, what is lost when Black journalists are no longer at the table, and what people can do to inform themselves in an era where billionaires with agendas control the news.

programme.title: Pod Save America (Graham Platner Isn't Backing Down)
programme.desc: Graham Platner, a Democratic candidate running for Senate in Maine, stops by the studio to talk with Jon about Trump’s impending conflict with Iran, the future of Medicare for All, and what community organizing in rural Maine taught him about building political power in our polarized era. The two discuss new polls showing Platner leading Janet Mills in the Democratic Senate primary, how his tattoo controversy has resonated with Maine voters, and what he wants to change about the Democratic Party to rebuild a winning, working-class coalition.

programme.title: Lovett or Leave It (Lisa Rinna Opens Up About Her Traitors FEUD with Colton Underwood)
programme.desc: Lisa Rinna takes the Lovett or Leave It stage to take us behind the scenes of Traitors - and explain what happens when the inner Housewife is released.

programme.title: Strict Scrutiny (Affirmative Action for Mediocre Men)
programme.desc: Leah and Melissa break down what may be a new low for the Court: granting Alabama’s request to reinstate racially discriminatory voting maps. Then, they turn to the big questions: how dead is Trump’s slush fund for insurrectionists? Just how awful are Acting AG Todd Blanche and Acting DNI Bill Pulte? Will Michigan’s Democratic senators stand up to Trump’s appalling nominee for a seat on the U.S. District Court for the Eastern District of Michigan? They also cover three SCOTUS opinions from last week before Melissa speaks with Yale Law Professor Judith Resnik about her recent book, Impermissible Punishments: How Prison Became a Problem for Democracy.

programme.title: Pod Save America (The Splintering MAGA Media Rage Machine)
programme.desc: Will Sommers, author of The Bulwark's "False Flag" newsletter, sits down with Tommy to talk about the MAGA media world — including the right-wing personalities who may be considering a political future (Tucker Carlson and Candace Owens), those whose influence is crumbling (Ben Shapiro), and some of the most troubling — and strangest — rising voices. Tommy and Will then break down the ways some of MAGA's leading voices are abandoning the president, what their world will look like and whether it can even survive in a post-Trump future.

programme.title: Offline with Jon Favreau (Is Maculinism Holding MAGA Together?)
programme.desc: Who are the men who want women to be quiet? Author and Atlantic staff writer Helen Lewis argues it’s nearly everyone on the right. She joins Offline to make the case that “masculinism” and its mission to reestablish the primacy of men is what unites conservatives more than anything else…except maybe Donald Trump. In reporting her most recent cover story, Helen spoke with so-called intellectuals and leaders of the masculinism movement, many of whom have direct ties to senior MAGA officials, even as they speak openly about repealing women’s rights: to vote, to run for office, and to make basic decisions about work and life. Jon and Helen discuss how influencers profit by preying on young men, how right wing grievances are bleeding into electoral contests across the country, and who can model better masculinity for boys.

programme.title: This F*cking Guy (Nancy Mace: Everything You Didn't Know About Her Sh*tty Past)
programme.desc: In our 24th episode of This F*cking Guy, Erin and Alyssa dive deep into the past of the chaos muppet herself, Nancy Mace. From her freaky obsession with trans people to her desperate attempts to kiss Trump's a**, is Nancy our most attention-seeking guy yet?

programme.title: The Cow Killer
programme.desc: Oliver's crops are getting stomped on by Irene the cow. In his frustration, he fires a shotgun to scare Irene away. Instead the blast leads to a hilarious misunderstanding among Lisa, Eb and a life-sized fiberglass cow.

programme.title: The Confrontation
programme.desc: Oliver has become the new School Board President. Unfortunately, Oliver's first day on the job is anything but smooth. Arnold the pig is expelled from his duties as the school's mascot, and Fred Ziffel implores Oliver to defend Arnold.

programme.title: The Case Of The Hooterville Refund Fraud
programme.desc: After receiving a tax refund from the IRS, Oliver inspires his fellow citizens to make similar requests. There's only one problem... those making requests haven't paid their taxes! Nevertheless, the IRS mistakenly sends out half a million dollars!

programme.title: The Picnic
programme.desc: Oliver is insistent that he and Lisa have a romantic Sunday afternoon picnic, all alone. His romantic gesture for two turns into a picnic for the entire town. Finally, Oliver finds them a romantic refuge in a most unlikely place.

programme.title: The Beeping Rock
programme.desc: Local boy Dinky Watson has one heck of a story to tell anyone who will listen. When Dinky convinces Lisa to buy a "moon rock" for the considerable sum of $14, Oliver suspects that she is the victim of a practical joke.

programme.title: Uncle Fedor
programme.desc: When Lisa's Uncle Fedor comes to visit her at the farm, he is visibly upset. He claims that someone is following him. Indeed, Fedor is convinced that the Secret Police are out to steal back a valuable scientific formula, which only he knows.

programme.title: The Wealthy Landowner
programme.desc: When Eb places an ad in a magazine claiming to be a wealthy landowner, it catches the eye of a young socialite. When the young woman makes an unexpected visit to Hooterville, Eb is forced to keep up his ruse.

programme.title: Happy Birthday
programme.desc: Oliver is upset when he finds out Arnold the pig and he share the same birthday. Jealous that Arnold is getting more attention than he is, Oliver becomes convinced that Lisa is throwing him a surprise party and drives all over town in search for it.

programme.title: The City Kids
programme.desc: Oliver and Lisa play host to four children from the city, who find themselves in Hooterville as part of a rural exposure program. The kids learn how to milk the cow, pick vegetables, plant seeds, and share sleeping quarters with four-legged friends.

programme.title: The Coming Out Party
programme.desc: Little Lori Baker, who after coming to stay with the Douglases on a rural experience program, is staying on at the Douglas farm. This city girl, like Oliver, has found that she loves the country life! Lisa decides to throw Lori a welcome party.

programme.title: A Royal Love Story
programme.desc: Lisa tells a rather fanciful version of how she met and fell in love with Oliver. The Douglases' house guest, little Lori Baker from the city, is all ears. The tale begins with how Lisa's father, the king, was exiled, causing Lisa to flee to Paris.

programme.title: Oliver Goes Broke
programme.desc: The residents of Hooterville assume that Oliver Douglas must be broke when Lisa is spotted looking for work and standing in line at the soup kitchen. But assumptions in this town, even logical ones, are bound to be wrong.

programme.title: The Great Mayoralty Campaign
programme.desc: There is the old adage that warns never to discuss politics with your spouse... but what if you are both running for the same office?! That predicament comes true when Oliver and Lisa face each other in the Hooterville mayoral election.

programme.title: Eb's Double Trouble
programme.desc: Lisa and Oliver try to sort out of the troubles of fools in love. The problems begin when Eb invites both his girlfriend and another young woman to the same dance, while Arnold the pig falls for not one, but two attractive bovines.

programme.title: Apple Picking Time
programme.desc: Oliver is having a tough time. He has no one to help him pick the apples from his orchard, and he's promised to teach Lisa how to drive. The neighbors are all injured from assisting other harvests, and Lisa has a run-in with a sheriff.

programme.title: Enterprising Eb
programme.desc: Eb feels the time is right to settle down and marry Darlene. However, he has nowhere near the money it will take to make a down payment on a house. With the help of the Douglases, who have given him two acres of land, Eb applies for a loan.

programme.title: The High Cost Of Loving
programme.desc: Eb believes he has found his destiny when an accounting course he has enrolled in turns out to be acting workshop. All the world's a stage. Ed dives into acting and turns every simple interaction at the Douglas farm into a starring role.

programme.title: Lurch And His Harpsicord
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: Morticia, The Breadwinner
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family And The Spaceman
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: My Son, The Chimp
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: Morticia's Favorite Charity
programme.desc: Moriticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: Progress And The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: Uncle Fester's Toupee
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: Cousin Itt And The Vocational Counselor
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: Lurch, The Teenage Idol
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Winning Of Morticia Addams
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight, members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: My Fair Cousin Itt
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: Morticia's Romance (Part 1)
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: Morticia's Romance (Part 2)
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: Morticia Meets Royalty
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: Gomez, The People's Choice
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: Cousin Itt's Problem
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: June 2, 2026
programme.desc: Kara and Scott deliver sharp takes on tech, business, politics—plus bold bets, banter, winners & losers.

programme.title: Sharp Truths From A British Comedian
programme.desc: Having made his career out of cutting jokes and brutal roasts, today Jimmy Carr reveals a more introspective side. Jimmy opens up about his favorite parts of life, the best bits of his show, and the wisdom he's picked up along the way. Expect to learn why Jimmy is such a fan of the show, and how his thinking has been influenced but the MW podcast ecosystem, how to know what you should be doing with your life, ways to overcome anxiety and dealing with the balance of meaning and pleasure, what life is like on the road for Jimmy, how Jimmy has learned to enjoy his time better, and where he finds gratitude, how fatherhood changed Jimmy for the better, how to become someone worth becoming, and much more…

programme.title: Living with Confidence & Going All In
programme.desc: Expect to learn why Matthew says life often “rhymes”, why it’s okay if you do everything right and still not get the result you want, how Matthew views the role courage plays in his life, how to learn to deal with failure, the difference between a nice guy and a good man, the most important principle Matthew refuses to compromise on, the appropriate balance of running toward a life you want vs. away from one that you fear, how to balance self-confidence with humility, the difference between “being” and “acting”, what it means to be more impressed with the wow instead of the how, rumors on Matthew’s return to the True Detective franchise, and much more…

programme.title: How To Find Direction When Nothing Feels Right
programme.desc: From 6× Mr. Olympia to full-time business owner and stay-at-home dad, it’s safe to say Chris Bumstead’s been enjoying retired life. So what’s he been up to this past year, what’s changed most for him, and what’s he looking forward to next? Expect to learn how retirement is going for Cbum, if Cbum would have retired last year even if he didn’t win, how Chris learned to sit and process his emotions, if Cbum regrets retirement and if he misses the competing yet, how Chris plans on leveling up for baby Bumstead number two, he hardest part of losing that “Mr. Olympia structure” in daily life, if Chris ever plans on returning the stage again, and much more…

programme.title: Comforting Truths About Human Nature
programme.desc: How can we truly understand ourselves? Most of us either ignore our emotions or overthink them, turning simple feelings into complex puzzles. So how do we navigate the minefield of emotion to grow and become better? Expect to learn where self-esteem really comes from, why criticism hurts so much, where imposter syndrome comes from and how to overcome it, if hustle culture is a modern phenomenon or is this something new, why we tend to intellectualise our emotions, why we have existential crisis’ and how to navigate them, why online dating is so miserable for so many people and much more…

programme.title: How to Treat Men Better
programme.desc: Are modern gender dynamics leaving men feeling ‘castrated’? While men are often blamed for today’s social problems, far less attention is given to how shifting expectations of women and relationships may also shape male identity. What role do women play in this dynamic—and how can it be improved? Expect to learn how important it is for women to seem impressed or giddy or appreciative of their partner, how women can appear more receptive or appreciative, why men are being emasculated by women, how women can stop castrating men and much more…
